analysis.reasoning: Core message: A U.S. official expresses condolences to President Zelenskyy for the UIA Flight 752 crash victims and offers U.S. support and assistance to Ukraine in the investigation, affirming "We stand with #Ukraine." Evaluation: US1 (honorable tradition) – Not explicitly invoked; no reference to historical legacy or traditions. US2 (admirable society) – Not applicable; no mention of U.S. societal groups or heroes. US3 (hostile enemies) – Not present; the tweet does not identify or criticize an adversary. US4 (force for good) – Partially fits: offering support/assistance in an investigation and standing with a nation after tragedy positions the U.S. as aiding peace, security, and human rights in a humanitarian context. US5 (great international ally) – Clearly fits: "We stand with #Ukraine" and readiness to assist underscores steadfast support to an ally. US6 (at the forefront) – Not applicable; no claim of leadership or superiority. Conclusion: The tweet promotes US4 and US5.
